title: Rex Splode Killer Queen (JCraft: EOE)
description: Replaces KQ (BTD) skin3 with Rex Splode from Invincible (JOJO, JJBA)
body:
Replaces KQ (BTD) skin3 with Rex Splode from Invincible

Killer Queen go boom... Rex Splode go boom... do you understand?

https://www.planetminecraft.com/skin/rex-splode-invincible-tv-series/

Changes the apparence of your JoJo stand

Type "Subsetg4ming" in your search bar to find everything by me!
